metadata.description: Optional. Name of the solution to deploy. This should be 3-20 characters long.
Optional. A unique text value for the solution. This is used to ensure resource names are unique for global resources.
Required. Azure region for all services.
Optional. Tags to be applied to the resources.
Required. Location for the Azure AI Services deployment.
Optional. Type of GPT deployment to use: Standard | GlobalStandard.
Optional. Name of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Version of the GPT model to deploy. Empty string uses the latest available version.
Optional. Capacity of the GPT deployment.
Optional. The container registry login server or endpoint for the container images.
Optional. The image tag for the container images.
Optional. Enable private networking for the deployment.
Optional. Enable redundancy for applicable resources.
Optional. Enable scalability for applicable resources.
Optional. Enable or disable usage telemetry for the deployment.
Optional. Existing Log Analytics Workspace resource ID.
Optional. Existing Azure AI Foundry project resource ID.
Solution name suffix used to derive the resource name.
Optional. Override name for the Log Analytics workspace. Defaults to log-{solutionName}.
Tags to apply to the resource.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace.
Solution name suffix used to derive the resource name.
Optional. Override name for the Application Insights instance. Defaults to appi-{solutionName}.
Tags to apply to the resource.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace to link to.
Resource ID of the Application Insights instance.
Name of the Application Insights instance.
Instrumentation key for the Application Insights instance.
Connection string for the Application Insights instance.
Application ID of the Application Insights instance.
Required. Name of the AI Services account.
Required. Azure region for the resource.
Optional. Principal IDs to assign Cognitive Services OpenAI User role.
Optional. Whether public network access is allowed.
Optional. Tags to apply to the resource.
Optional. Name of the AI Foundry project to create. If empty, no project is created.
The name of the deployed AI Services account.
The resource ID of the AI Services account.
The endpoint of the AI Services account.
The principal ID of the system-assigned managed identity.
The AI Foundry project endpoint (empty if no project created).
The name of the AI Foundry project (empty if no project created).
Required. Name of the parent AI Services account.
Required. Name for this model deployment.
Optional. Model version. Empty string means latest.
Required. SKU capacity (tokens per minute in thousands).
Resource ID of the model deployment.
Solution name suffix used to derive the resource name.
Tags to apply to the resource.
Enable hierarchical namespace (Data Lake Storage Gen2).
Resource ID of the Storage Account.
Solution name suffix used to derive the resource name.
Name of the Cosmos DB account.
Tags to apply to the resource.
HA paired region for multi-region failover.

properties.locations: [if(and(parameters('zoneRedundant'), not(empty(parameters('haLocation')))), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', true()), createObject('locationName', parameters('haLocation'), 'failoverPriority', 1, 'isZoneRedundant', true())), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', parameters('zoneRedundant'))))]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the Cosmos DB account.
Name of the Cosmos DB account.
MongoDB connection string (without credentials — use Key Vault for secrets).
Endpoint of the Cosmos DB account.
Solution name used for naming convention.
Name of the App Configuration store.
Tags to apply to the resource.
Key-value pairs to store in the configuration.
The name of the App Configuration store.
The endpoint of the App Configuration store.
The resource ID of the App Configuration store.
Solution name used for naming convention.
The name of the container registry.
The resource ID of the container registry.
Solution name used for naming convention.
Name of the Container Apps Environment.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.
Subnet resource ID for VNet integration (optional).
Workload profiles configuration (e.g., Consumption or dedicated D4 profiles).
The name of the Container Apps Environment.
The resource ID of the Container Apps Environment.
The default domain of the Container Apps Environment.
The static IP address of the Container Apps Environment.

value.name: [variables('contentProcessorAppName')]
value.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'APP_CONFIG_ENDPOINT', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', take(format('module.app-configuration.{0}', parameters('solutionName')), 64)), '2025-04-01').outputs.endpoint.value), createObject('name', 'APP_ENV', 'value', 'prod'), createObject('name', 'APP_LOGGING_LEVEL', 'value', 'INFO'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_PACKAGE_LOGGING_LEVEL', 'value', 'WARNING'), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', if(parameters('enableMonitoring'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', take(format('module.app-insights.{0}', parameters('solutionName')), 64)), '2025-04-01').outputs.connectionString.value, ''))), createArray(createObject('name', 'OTEL_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', 'ContentProcessor')))]

parameters.registries: [if(variables('useExternalRegistry'), createObject('value', null()), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('server', if(empty(parameters('containerRegistryEndpoint')), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', take(format('module.container-registry.{0}', parameters('solutionName')), 64)), '2025-04-01').outputs.loginServer.value, parameters('containerRegistryEndpoint')), 'identity', 'system'))))]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the Container Apps Environment.
Whether to allow insecure ingress connections.

variables.identityConfig: [if(empty(parameters('managedIdentities')), createObject('type', 'None'), createObject('type', if(contains(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), if(and(contains(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'systemAssigned'), parameters('managedIdentities').systemAssigned), 'SystemAssigned,UserAssigned', 'UserAssigned'), 'SystemAssigned'), 'userAssignedIdentities', if(contains(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), reduce(parameters('managedIdentities').userAssignedResourceIds, createObject(), lambda('cur', 'id', union(lambdaVariables('cur'), createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject())))), null())))]
variables.ingressConfig: [if(parameters('disableIngress'), null(), createObject('external', parameters('ingressExternal'), 'targetPort', parameters('ingressTargetPort'), 'transport', parameters('ingressTransport'), 'allowInsecure', parameters('ingressAllowInsecure'), 'corsPolicy', if(not(empty(parameters('corsPolicy'))), parameters('corsPolicy'), null())))]
